label: Meme group
description: Defines a visual grouping of meme icons on the ideology screen, controlling how a set of memes is laid out and rendered together.

drawOffset.label: Draw offset
drawOffset.description: UI draw offset for this group's icon cluster in normalized screen space, as (x, y).

maxRows.label: Max rows
maxRows.description: Maximum number of meme icons stacked in a column for this group.

renderOrder.label: Render order
renderOrder.description: Sort order for rendering this group on the ideology screen. Lower values render first.

renderWithGap.label: Render with gap
renderWithGap.description: Whether to add extra spacing before this group when rendering.
